qa_pairs.question: How do I select files or directories for a transfer in Globus?
qa_pairs.answer: You can highlight a file or directory for transfer by single-clicking on it. To highlight multiple items, use Control-click.

qa_pairs.question: What is the next step after selecting files for a transfer?
qa_pairs.answer: After selecting the files or directories, you need to click on one of the big blue buttons with white arrowheads to initiate the transfer.

qa_pairs.question: What happens immediately after a Globus transfer is initiated?
qa_pairs.answer: Once initiated, the transfer job will be given a unique ID and will begin right away.

qa_pairs.question: How will I know when a Globus transfer is complete?
qa_pairs.answer: You will receive an email when the transfer is complete.

qa_pairs.question: How can I monitor the progress of a Globus transfer or view details of completed transfers?
qa_pairs.answer: You can monitor in-progress transfers and view details of completed transfers by clicking on the 'Activity' button on the left side of the Globus portal.
